moments.title: The Open Championship: Moving Day
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship continues today with Round 3 at Royal Birkdale, as the world's best golfers battle for the Claret Jug.

angles.name: Golf Action
angles.copy: Third round underway at Royal Birkdale! Who's making a charge on Moving Day at The Open Championship?

angles.name: UK Golf Spotlight
angles.copy: All eyes on Royal Birkdale for Round 3 of The Open. The leaderboard is tight – can a local hero emerge?

moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Final
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 culminates tomorrow, July 19th, with the highly anticipated final match.

angles.name: Final Countdown
angles.copy: It all comes down to this! The FIFA World Cup 2026 Final is tomorrow. Who are you backing to lift the trophy?

angles.name: Football Fever
angles.copy: The biggest game in football is just hours away. Get ready for the World Cup Final tomorrow!

moments.title: Splendour Festival in Nottingham
moments.blurb: Nottinghamshire's biggest festival, Splendour, is live this weekend at Wollaton Hall & Deer Park, featuring five stages of music across all genres.

angles.name: Splendour Kicks Off
angles.copy: Splendour Festival is LIVE! Who's at Wollaton Hall today for the start of Nottinghamshire's biggest music event?

angles.name: Nottingham Vibes
angles.copy: Music, sun, and good times! Splendour Festival is bringing the noise to Nottingham this weekend.

moments.title: Big Love Festival in South Wales
moments.blurb: The Big Love music and arts festival is currently live in the beautiful Welsh countryside, celebrating its 10th year with over 130 acts.

angles.name: Welsh Festival Fun
angles.copy: Big Love Festival is happening right now in South Wales! Who's enjoying the music, arts, and good vibes in the Welsh countryside?

angles.name: South Wales Party
angles.copy: It's Big Love's 10th anniversary and the party is in full swing! Celebrating music and arts in stunning South Wales.

moments.title: As One in the Park London
moments.blurb: London's LGBTQ+ festival, As One in the Park, is taking over Walpole Park today with four stages of music, cabaret, and cocktails.

angles.name: London Pride Party
angles.copy: Walpole Park is alive with As One in the Park today! Celebrating London's LGBTQ+ community with incredible music and energy.

angles.name: West London Beats
angles.copy: From Pabllo Vittar to Todd Terry, As One in the Park is bringing massive names to West London today. Get down there!

moments.title: Latitude Festival Returns
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival, celebrating 20 years, returns to Henham Park in Suffolk from July 23-26, promising a weekend of music, arts, and culture.

angles.name: Latitude Anticipation
angles.copy: Just days until Latitude Festival takes over Henham Park! Who's counting down to a weekend of discovery in Suffolk?

angles.name: Suffolk Summer
angles.copy: Celebrating 20 years of Latitude! Get ready for music, comedy, and more in the stunning surroundings of Henham Park, starting July 23rd.

moments.title: Together Again Festival
moments.blurb: The Together Again Festival returns to Bolesworth Castle in Cheshire from July 24-26, bringing world-class music, arts, and a family-friendly atmosphere.

angles.name: Cheshire Festival Prep
angles.copy: Together Again Festival is almost here! Get ready for three days of music, arts, and culture at Bolesworth Castle, starting July 24th.

angles.name: Dance & Disco
angles.copy: From tech house to disco, the Agora stage at Together Again Festival promises huge names. Who's ready to dance in Cheshire next weekend?

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean Top UK Chart
moments.blurb: Sam Fender and Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' holds the UK Number 1 spot for an incredible 17th week, making it the second longest-running chart-topper of all time.

angles.name: Chart Reign
angles.copy: 17 weeks at Number 1! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean are making history with 'Rein Me In'. Is it your favourite track right now?

angles.name: Record Breakers
angles.copy: Only one song has spent more time at Number 1! 'Rein Me In' continues its chart domination. What's your favourite Sam Fender or Olivia Dean track?

moments.title: World Cup Anthems Storm UK Chart
moments.blurb: Football fever sees Oasis' 'Wonderwall' at No. 2 and Baddiel, Skinner & The Lightning Seeds' 'Three Lions' at No. 3 on the Official UK Singles Chart, driven by the FIFA World Cup.

angles.name: Football's Coming Home
angles.copy: World Cup fever is real! 'Wonderwall' and 'Three Lions' are soaring up the charts. Which football anthem gets you hyped?

angles.name: Chart Comeback
angles.copy: Oasis and 'Three Lions' back in the Top 3! The power of football bringing classic tracks back to the forefront.

moments.title: Happy 87th to Dion DiMucci
moments.blurb: Legendary American rock and roll singer Dion DiMucci, known for hits like 'Runaround Sue' and 'The Wanderer', turns 87 today.

angles.name: Dion's Day
angles.copy: Happy 87th Birthday to the iconic Dion DiMucci! Still rockin' on. What's your favourite Dion track?

angles.name: Timeless Tunes
angles.copy: From doo-wop to rock, Dion's voice is unforgettable. Celebrating 87 years of a music legend today!

moments.title: Happy 85th to Martha Reeves
moments.blurb: Martha Reeves, the powerhouse lead singer of Motown group Martha Reeves and the Vandellas, celebrates her 85th birthday today.

angles.name: Motown Queen
angles.copy: Happy 85th Birthday to the incredible Martha Reeves! Her voice defined an era. What's your favourite Vandellas hit?

angles.name: Dancing in the Street
angles.copy: Still bringing the joy! Wishing a very happy 85th to Motown legend Martha Reeves today.

moments.title: Happy 79th to Carlos Santana
moments.blurb: The legendary guitarist Carlos Santana, known for his unique blend of rock, Latin, and jazz, turns 79 on July 20th.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Carlos Santana on July 20th! What's your favourite Santana riff?

angles.name: Smooth Sounds
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible career of Carlos Santana as he turns 79 this Monday. His music continues to inspire!

moments.title: Happy 34th to Selena Gomez
moments.blurb: Pop superstar, actress, and businesswoman Selena Gomez celebrates her 34th birthday on July 22nd.

angles.name: Selena's Day
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 34th birthday to the amazing Selena Gomez on Wednesday! What's your top Selena track?

angles.name: Pop Icon
angles.copy: From Disney to global pop sensation, Selena Gomez turns 34 this week. Celebrate her incredible career!

moments.title: Happy 79th to Don Henley
moments.blurb: Don Henley, the iconic drummer and vocalist for The Eagles, and a successful solo artist, turns 79 on July 22nd.

angles.name: Eagles Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the legendary Don Henley on July 22nd! What's your favourite Eagles song or his solo hit?

angles.name: Voice of a Generation
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible voice and songwriting of Don Henley as he turns 79 this Wednesday.

moments.title: Happy 65th to Martin Gore
moments.blurb: Martin Gore, the principal songwriter, guitarist, and keyboardist for the iconic electronic band Depeche Mode, turns 65 on July 23rd.

angles.name: Synth Pop Maestro
angles.copy: Happy 65th Birthday to Depeche Mode's brilliant Martin Gore on Thursday! What's your all-time favourite Depeche Mode track?

angles.name: Electronic Pioneer
angles.copy: Celebrating the songwriting genius of Martin Gore as he turns 65 this week. An architect of electronic music!

moments.title: Happy 83rd to Mick Jagger
moments.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday on July 26th.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 83rd Birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger on July 26th! Still got the moves. What's your favourite Stones song?

angles.name: Still Rolling
angles.copy: Celebrating 83 years of rock and roll royalty! Mick Jagger's energy is unmatched. What's his most iconic moment for you?

moments.title: Happy 77th to Roger Taylor
moments.blurb: Roger Taylor, the acclaimed drummer and co-songwriter for the legendary rock band Queen, turns 77 on July 26th.

angles.name: Queen's Beat
angles.copy: Happy 77th Birthday to Queen's incredible drummer, Roger Taylor, on July 26th! What's your favourite Queen track he wrote or sang?

angles.name: Drumming Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating the powerful drumming and songwriting of Roger Taylor as he turns 77 this Sunday. A true rock legend!

moments.title: Commonwealth Games Glasgow 2026
moments.blurb: The Commonwealth Games kick off in Glasgow on July 23rd, bringing 10 days of world-class sporting action to Scotland.

angles.name: Glasgow Gets Ready
angles.copy: Just days until the Commonwealth Games begin in Glasgow! Get ready for 10 days of incredible sport and national pride.

angles.name: Team UK Spirit
angles.copy: Who are you cheering for at the Commonwealth Games, starting July 23rd in Glasgow? Let the games begin!

moments.title: Kynren Live in County Durham
moments.blurb: Kynren, the epic open-air night spectacular, begins its summer run near Auckland Castle in County Durham today, taking audiences on a 90-minute journey through British history.

angles.name: Spectacular Kynren
angles.copy: Kynren is back! The breathtaking outdoor show starts tonight in County Durham, bringing history to life with pyrotechnics and stunning effects.

angles.name: North East Magic
angles.copy: Experience the magic of Kynren! A truly unique and epic journey through British history, live from County Durham starting today.
